release.name: n8n@2.18.6
release.body:
## [2.18.6](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.18.5...n8n@2.18.6) (2026-05-01)


### Bug Fixes

* **core:** Restore peer project discovery in share dropdowns ([#29565](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29565)) ([bf133fd](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/bf133fd5120401a48974dbb05b118d93b8e48dce))

items.rawText: **core:** Restore peer project discovery in share dropdowns ([#29565](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29565)) ([bf133fd](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/bf133fd5120401a48974dbb05b118d93b8e48dce))
